query: Spawn the manifest at .claude/squad/runs/migration-2026-04-24/manifest.json. Two of the tasks touch src/db/models.ts in parallel.
expected_behavior: Detects the file-ownership violation in the manifest (two parallel tasks share a non-read-only target_file)
Prints the violating task ids and the shared path
Suggests re-running /decompose so the two tasks are sequenced via a dependencies edge
Does not create the integration branch
Does not attempt to silently resolve the conflict at cherry-pick time
